source: pred.gg public profile + own aggregate baselines

archetype.label: Closet Khaimera Main
archetype.receipt: 62.6% over 177 games on Khaimera — about 11 more wins per 100 games than the average Khaimera player. The wide pool hides a weapon.

entries.change: Move your carry games to jungle
Queue jungle instead of your average mix
entries.receipt: 53.9% there vs 49.5% overall, 297 games of evidence

ledger.note: wins per 100 games spent on each change; entries overlap and do not sum

plan: Queue jungle as primary. It is your best role at 53.9% over 297 games (your overall is 49.5%). Set jungle as secondary, not the other way around.
Stop queueing carry: 42.9% over 196 games is costing real VP. When auto-filled there, play your safest comfort pick, not a learning pick.
Two-hero rule for the climb: Khaimera and Greystone. Compared with the average player on the same hero, you win about 11.0 and 3.4 more games per 100 on them.
Your champion pool is 25+ heroes wide and your top three are only 28% of your games. Gold-to-Platinum climbs are almost always pool-narrowing stories: aim for 70%+ of games on your top three.
Park Murdock, Drongo, Serath, Lt. Belica for ranked: 42% over 111; 41% over 69; 37% over 51; 39% over 33. Keep them for normals.
The math: you are at 299 VP; Platinum III starts at 900. Your all-time peak is 692.
honesty: personal winrates are shrunk toward your own average (small heater samples do not count as mains)
field baselines are all-ranks aggregates from our current-patch match sample, not Gold-bracket-specific yet
winrate edges are observational; they say where you win, not why

insights.title: Khaimera is not just your best hero, it is your most disciplined
insights.finding: On Khaimera you die 5.2/game vs your 5.9 average. The winrate edge is partly a discipline edge; that habit can travel to other picks.
insights.receipt: 177 games on Khaimera, 62.6% shrunk vs field 51.6%

insights.title: Vision is your cheapest upgrade
insights.finding: 2.8 wards per game, 52% of the squad average. Wards cost nothing and you are leaving them in the shop.
insights.receipt: 4,021 placed + 248 cleared over 1534 games; squad average 5.3/game

insights.title: Mr_Meat31 brings out your best
insights.finding: Your record alongside Mr_Meat31 is 54% over 228 ranked games — your strongest pairing in the stack. When only two of you queue, make it this one.

insights.title: For the group chat
insights.finding: 2 pentakills on record and a 22-kill spree. Xeebs has receipts.
